untranslatable_reason: The signal requires ranking by 'momentum score' which is not defined in the allowed indicators list. Momentum score is a composite metric not available as a direct indicator (would need to compute from returns/price data). Additionally, the rule requires portfolio-level ranking and decile selection across NIFTY100 constituents, which is a cross-sectional portfolio construction rule rather than a time-series technical indicator condition. The backtest engine would need custom scoring logic and ranking functionality to implement this signal.
translation_notes: This is a factor-based portfolio ranking strategy (quantile/decile selection) rather than a technical indicator-based entry/exit rule. It requires: (1) definition of momentum_score metric, (2) cross-sectional ranking of universe constituents, (3) portfolio-level operations (not single-stock conditions). Standard technical indicators cannot express this signal type.
